personal.name: Ansu Kumari
personal.title: Software Engineer · Data Engineering · Full-Stack
personal.subtitle: Delivering measurable impact — 70% faster testing, 95%+ detection rate, 82% ML accuracy
personal.summary: Final-year B.Tech Computer Science (Data Science) student with hands-on experience building Python automation tools, full-stack REST APIs, and ML-powered applications. Delivered measurable impact: 70% reduction in manual testing time, 95%+ vulnerability detection rate, and 82% ML directional accuracy. Seeking software development or data engineering roles leveraging Python, Flask, Node.js, and cloud DevOps.

experience.role: Cyber Security Intern — SQL Injection Scanner
highlights: Built an automated SQL Injection scanner in Python covering 50+ endpoints, reducing manual testing time by ~70%.
Implemented error-based, boolean-based, and time-based detection techniques achieving 95%+ detection rate on test targets.
Designed multi-threaded form crawling and payload fuzzing modules, cutting scan time by ~40% vs. sequential execution.
Delivered CVSS-scored vulnerability reports with remediation strategies for 3 client web applications.

projects.title: Human Behavior Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: NLP pipeline classifying sentiment and emotion on 17K+ tweets with ~80% accuracy and a Streamlit dashboard with <2s inference time.
highlights: Multi-label crime classification: phishing, scam, fraud
Word cloud & heatmap visualizations across 6 crime categories

projects.title: Cryptocurrency ML Prediction Platform

highlights: ~82% directional accuracy on 2+ years of OHLCV data
CoinGecko API for live data ingestion
Full-stack Flask UI supporting 5+ cryptocurrency pairs
